description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a sleek, light beige fuselage and sharply swept wings that feature large, circular dark panels near the tips. The aircraft has a forward-positioned, tinted cockpit canopy with a faceted design, and two prominent jet engines mounted at the rear, flanking the central fuselage. The tail section is equipped with twin vertical stabilizers and a pair of short, canted horizontal stabilizers. The underside of the wings and fuselage appear smooth, with no visible landing gear extended. The overall design suggests a high-speed, possibly military or advanced urban transport role, with aerodynamic surfaces and minimal external protrusions. The airplane's surface is mostly matte with some glossy highlights on the canopy and engine intakes.
description: A sleek, futuristic beige airplane with swept wings, twin rear jet engines, and a faceted forward cockpit canopy. Features include twin vertical stabilizers and large circular panels on the wings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the wide, swept wings with circular panels near the tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the profile of the twin rear jet engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two large jet engine exhausts, twin vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan with circular panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, wing structure, and engine placement from the opposite profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and pronounced anhedral angle; large circular panels near the tips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane; canted horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible; configuration not apparent.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted canopy; appears to be single-seat.
